narrative:
Washington Township C (precinct in Clermont County) has 390 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.6 percentage points.
